at_a_glance: You have spent $3.53 across 6 sessions on April 18 alone. Phase 1 was the priciest at $1.30 — 11 tasks plus a phase review in one sitting. Costs have steadily declined since then: the last 4 sessions averaged $0.41, and this session (just one S-sized task) came in at $0.20. Prompt caching is still inactive — fixing that would cut every future session by 20-30%.

session_narratives.2026-04-18-001: Kick-off session covering brainstorm, architect, vibe-new-app, and spec review. Three large planning tasks read and wrote the full SPEC.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, BRIEF.md, and PLAN.md from scratch. Expensive per-token but unavoidable setup cost.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-002: The heaviest session — 11 Phase 1 tasks plus a full phase review and vibe-parallel orchestration. Average $0.12/task, right at the project norm for foundation work. Parallelisation added overhead but saved wall-clock time.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-003: F-STATE feature planning session: vibe-add-feature read all 5 spec files plus index.html, then generated FEATURE_SPEC.md, FEATURE_PLAN.md, FEATURE_TASKS.md. Spec review added $0.14. Near-identical pattern to other planning sessions — consistent.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-004: F-STATE build — 5 tasks (FST-001 through FST-005). Steady $0.10-0.13/task throughout. Context overhead ($0.045) reflects CLAUDE.md + CODEBASE.md being loaded every turn.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-005: F-FIRST-RUN feature planning. Two parallel Explore agents reading index.html, main.js, preload.js, SPEC.md, PLAN.md, CODEBASE.md added ~20K input tokens vs a single-agent approach. Spec review found and fixed 1 P1 + 2 P2 issues.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-006: Lightest session of the project — one S-sized task (FRN-004) completing the F-FIRST-RUN feature, plus this cost report. The checkFirstRunCompletion() stub was replaced in a single edit; most cost came from reading session context files and running vibe-cost.

recommendations.title: Prompt caching off — paying full price every turn
recommendations.body: Zero cache reads across all 6 sessions. CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and SPEC.md are re-read from scratch on every turn. These files alone are ~15,000 tokens. Enabling Anthropic prompt caching on the stable portions of CLAUDE.md would save ~90% on those reads. The active-feature block changes per session — split it into a stable cached header and a dynamic footer.

forecast_narrative: F-SPEECH, F-CLAUDE, and F-ACTIONS are next — each needs a planning session (~$0.44) and a build session (~$0.45-0.55). That is roughly $2.50-3.00 for Phase 2 completion. Phase 3 polish (4 tasks) should run ~$0.40-0.50. Full project total estimate: $6.40-7.00. Enabling prompt caching before F-SPEECH starts could save $0.30-0.50 off the remaining work.
